hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, re
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
path = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
if re.search(r'\.claude/skills/[^/]+/SKILL\.md$', path):
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PostToolUse', 'additionalContext': 'A new skill SKILL.md was just written. Remember to update lib/docs/DevelopingWithAI.mdx with a section describing this new skill - what it does, how to invoke it, and a usage example.'}}))
" 2>/dev/null || true
